user_query: For all days that don't have a dinner planned, add a cheap dinner option.

fields.name: A&W Canada (Airport)
fields.description: Quick and affordable burger meal at the airport terminal before boarding the flight.

result.reasoning: Day 10 ends with a 6:00 PM flight and only has a snack stop at 4:00 PM. Adding a cheap dinner option at 5:00 PM before departure completes the itinerary. Position -1 appends it to the end of the day's activities.
